allow: Bash(python -c "from browser_fetcher import BrowserFetcher; print\('Import OK'\); print\('Class:', BrowserFetcher\); bf = BrowserFetcher\(\); print\('Instance:', bf\); print\('headless:', bf.headless\); print\('timeout:', bf.timeout\); print\('Has fetch:', callable\(bf.fetch\)\); print\('Has _run_actions:', callable\(bf._run_actions\)\)")
